title: Run remaining LTR localized UI HIG gate
summary: Ran the HIG localized UI gate for fr, it, nb, pt, pt-BR, es, vi under the internal-reviewer signoff baseline. Doc-only intake: source-trace inspection of tab labels and primary actions plus a validated multisurface-harness dry-run (49 captures planned, idb ready). Result: fail because no screenshot evidence is preserved for any of the 7 locales. Allocated HIG-FR-001 (major / adaptive-layout / open) for the French Today tab label 'Aujourd'hui' (11 chars vs en 5) — tab-bar truncation risk on smaller iPhone widths. Six other locales have no source-level HIG findings but cannot pass without screenshot evidence. Screenshot capture is deferred to a follow-up slice.

translation_quality_risks_noted_not_hig_: nb: 'Tren' for Train tab is the noun form (a train), not the verb (to train) — translation-quality concern, native review required

not_claimed: any of these 7 LTR locales is hig-ui-reviewed
any of these 7 LTR locales is native-reviewed
translation quality for any of these 7 LTR locales
screenshot-reviewed, device-verified, or testflight-verified for any of these 7 LTR locales
residual_risk: HIG-FR-001 is a source-trace inference. Whether the tab label actually truncates depends on iPhone width and Dynamic Type setting; needs screenshot confirmation.
Six locales (it/nb/pt/pt-BR/es/vi) have no recorded HIG finding only because no screenshots were captured. Live screenshots may surface additional issues.
Norwegian 'Tren' for Train tab is a translation-quality concern, not a HIG defect; native reviewer still needed.
The multisurface harness needs label-overrides for nb ('I dag') and vi ('Hôm nay') for the today surface; default catalog does not include those localized labels.
downstream_recommendations: Schedule a screenshot-capture slice for these 7 locales using automation/smoke/capture_localized_surfaces.py --capture with --label-overrides for nb + vi.
After capture, append screenshot file references here and update the all-locale HIG evidence matrix per_locale_state for these 7 locales.
If HIG-FR-001 is confirmed by screenshot, queue a UI-tweak slice for the tab-bar layout (not within a localization slice).
